'''âzh-th-m-b''' ('''kazhathmeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:amerce|amerce]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-th-m-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:amerce|amerce]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-th-m-b
|-
! Lemma
| kazhathmeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
